mermaidSyntax:
graph TD
  A[Literature Review] --> B[Hypothesis Formation]
  B --> C[Study Design]
  C --> D[Data Collection]
  C --> E[Ethical Approval]
  D --> F[Data Analysis]
  E --> F
  F --> G[Results Interpretation]
  G --> H[Publication]

  classDef phase1 fill:#3b82f6,stroke:#1e40af,color:#fff
  classDef phase2 fill:#10b981,stroke:#047857,color:#fff
  classDef phase3 fill:#8b5cf6,stroke:#6d28d9,color:#fff
  classDef phase4 fill:#f59e0b,stroke:#d97706,color:#fff

  class A,B phase1
  class C,D,E phase2
  class F,G phase3
  class H phase4
